title: Qwen 3.7 Plus now available on AI Gateway
summary: Qwen 3.7 Plus now available on AI Gateway
whyItMatters: Qwen 3.7 Plus from Alibaba is now available on Vercel AI Gateway . The model unifies vision and language into a single agent foundation, with capabilities spanning GUI and CLI operation, coding and productivity workflows with full-modality input, and visual agent tasks including perception and reasoning.
